summary: Iteration 3 testing: Messages polling, OnboardingWizard, changePassword, Resend domain notice, ResetPassword flow. All 12 backend tests passed (100%). All UI features verified with Playwright.

minor.issue: profile_verified is hardcoded to False during registration — cannot be set via register body. This means the OnboardingWizard will never auto-trigger for users created via invitation (accept-invite also hardcodes profile_verified=False). Workaround: PATCH /api/auth/me to set profile_verified=true.

action_items: Consider whether profile_verified should be set to True when a user accepts an invite (accept-invite flow) — currently hardcoded to False, so OnboardingWizard never auto-triggers in production for invited coaches.
critical_code_review_comments: profile_verified=False is hardcoded in both /api/auth/register and /api/auth/accept-invite. The OnboardingWizard checks profile_verified===true to show. If no admin action sets profile_verified, the wizard will never appear in production for any invited coach. The accept-invite flow should probably set profile_verified=True when a coach accepts their invite.
seed_data_creation: Created test coach user: onboard_wizard_test@nxgen.test (onboarding_completed=true after wizard test). Created another test user via pytest for change-password tests.

features_verified.messages_polling: Messages.jsx loads without subscribe() errors. setInterval polling visible in code (4s messages, 10s convos). No JS errors on page load.
features_verified.change_password_backend: POST /api/auth/change-password - correct pw → 200, wrong pw → 401, short pw → 400, no auth → 401. All pass.
features_verified.change_password_ui: Settings page Change Password section renders. Short password shows 'New password must be at least 6 characters' validation error.
features_verified.onboarding_wizard: Wizard appears for coach with team_id+profile_verified=true+onboarding_completed not set. All 5 steps work: Welcome (school name shown), Step 1 (Add Player), Step 2 (Schedule Game), Step 3 (Create Play), Done (Go to Dashboard sets onboarding_completed=true). Skip buttons work. Wizard does NOT appear for super_admin.
features_verified.resend_domain_notice: Blue notice banner 'Email delivery setup required' visible on UserManagement Schools tab for super_admin.
features_verified.forgot_password: POST /api/auth/forgot-password still works (200 for existing and non-existing emails).

context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 3: All new features pass. Key finding: profile_verified is hardcoded to False on register and accept-invite. OnboardingWizard only shows if profile_verified=true. In production, admin needs to manually set profile_verified=true (via PATCH /api/auth/me) or accept-invite should auto-set it. Messages polling works (no subscribe() call). Change password fully wired. Resend notice visible in SuperAdmin.
